title: The Gambit
description:
Gain [blue]50[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
If you take unblocked attack damage this combat, die.
upgraded_description:
Gain [blue]75[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
If you take unblocked attack damage this combat, die.
notes: Applies TheGambitPower which triggers death if unblocked attack damage is taken during combat. The Block value does not include Dexterity or other modifiers.
